E2E: per-comment actions in the CommentsPanel.  Covers the comment-card affordan
Grant ``user_id`` LEVEL_EDIT on the session via the permissions API.      :param
POST one open comment anchored to ``anchor`` and return its id.      When ``auth
PUT the test markdown file into the session's filesystem resources.
Seed a markdown file plus one open comment, yield (base_url, session_id, comment
Seed a file + one comment authored by ``_EDITOR``, who is granted edit.      For
Navigate to the session, open the seeded file, open the CommentsPanel.      :par
A long comment body clamps with a "Show more" toggle that expands it.
Editing a comment updates the card and persists through the REST API.      Drive
Deleting a comment removes the card and the comment from the REST list.      Dri
In single-user mode, a header-less comment shows Edit/Delete to any editor.
"Address All" sends open comments to the agent and moves them to Addressed.
The "Copy link" button yields a deep link that opens the exact comment.      Cli
